name: Mini Florentines
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the butter in a saucepan and add the caster sugar. Bring to a boil while stirring constantly.
2. Remove from heat and stir in the finely chopped cherries, hazelnuts, mixed peel, and lemon juice. Allow mixture to cool slightly.
3. Line two baking sheets with nonstick paper.
4. Preheat oven to 180°C/350°F/Gas Mark 4.
5. Place small heaps of the cooled mixture (about the size of a hazelnut) onto the prepared sheets, leaving space for spreading.
6. Bake for 5-6 minutes, or until lightly golden brown. Neaten edges with a knife.
7. Remove from oven and let cool on paper.
8. Melt chocolate in separate bowls over simmering water or microwave (3-4 minutes). Spread over cooled florentines.
9. Just before chocolate sets, use a fork to make wavy lines. Allow to cool completely.
